entry.title: 考研复试指南
entry.content:
Vocabulary

研究生：postgraduate

硕士：Master/Master’s degree

博士：Doctorate/Doctor’s degree

高考：college entrance examinations

研究生入学考试：National Entrance Test for MA/MS Candidates（NETM），Postgraduate entrance examination

初中：junior high school 高中：senior high school 小学：primary school 大学：university

Self-introduction

Good morning/afternoon dear professors, it’s my great honor to sit here for today’s interview, My name is *** and I come from chengde, a beautiful city of Hebei province, I will graduate from UESTC this coming July. My major is Computer Science and Technology. Now I’d like to introduce myself from 4 parts.

Firstly, during my college time, I studied hard at all the courses and got excellent grades in many professional subjects. I also won the National Encouragement Scholarship and built a solid foundation of my professional knowledge. As for my English level, I have passed CET-4 and CET-6, I really enjoy the process of learning English.

At the same time, In order to enrich my college life, I joined volunteer service department and worked two years. There, I learned how to communicate better with people and enjoyed the pleasure of helping others.

Besides, I am obsessed with computer programming and I like spending my spare time on it. I’ve done great job on my software development, which is named backup. The grade is just one point short of full score. I designed the client UI interface and completed the server upload function, the file verification and the code integration. As for my graduation project, the topic is completing the design and implementation of kv storage engine based on Raft protocol, a consensus algorithm for managing a replicated log.

Last but not least, for future study, I want to learn in Bigdata and Distributed Storage, and that’s also the orientation of my graduation project. By studying professional knowledge and reading relevant document, I find that I gradually began to develop a strong interest in that. In this way, I wish I could make some contributions in the field. But I’m still so far from that target, If I could be admitted, I will do my best to pursue it.

OK, that’s all, thank you for your attention.

Tips

do/pressure/hobby

Well, when I have some spare time on weekends, I like to hang out with my friends, do something active like sports. I played badminton with a couple of friends last week, and also, I like to read books and recharge my batteries.

book

The Little Prince includes a whole set of philosophical thoughts in its poetic sadness. It’s a fairy tale, but it’s not a fairy tale in the ordinary sense. It’s filled with thinking about the state of human life, but it doesn’t teach you any great truth, and it doesn’t even tell you any truth in a “speaking way”, it has nothing to do with preaching , everything is contained in this picturesque story. When you close the book, you will feel sweet and sad, and maybe even a little want to cry.

hometown(Cheng de)

I was born in Chengde, a beautiful city of Hebei province. when it comes to chengde, the first reaction of everyone will think of Mountain Resort, Indeed it is a landmark in my hometown. It was built in the early 18th. In my hometown, the surrounding area is quite beautiful. I really like it because it’s a young city with lots of energy, but if you need a break, it’s easy to drive to mountains and find a quiet place to relax. Chengde has changed quite a lot in the last twenty years, many people are moving there to work. Unfortunately the cost of living has also gone up quite a lot.

living place(Cheng du)

When it comes to Chengdu, the firet reactions of everyone will think of are pandas, beautiful scenery, delicious food and beautiful persons. And I think Chengdu is a cosmopolitan City in Sichuan province, you can see people from different ethnic backgrounds, from all over the world. Also, It’s a very touristic place. It’s teeming with tourists all year round. From the delicious food to beautiful scenery, it matches my heart very well. Chengdu has changed quite a lot in the last twenty years, many people are moving there to work. Unfortunately the cost of living has also gone up quite a lot.

plan

As I have very much looked forward to my postgraduate life, I have been giving it some thoughts. Firstly I want to read and learn extensively and systematically about this subject. There are a few topics to be honest, I am already very interested in, such as distiribued storage and big data. But I know they are a little bit too broad, at this point, I don’t think I fully understand what’s been done in this area. So if I am lucky to be admitted into your program, I will enroll in relavant coureses. And with the excellent mentor, with the bibliography, I’m sure that I can be more specific and I can even cultivate other interests. Meanwhile I will sezie the opportunity to take part in any research projects, so I will spare no efforts to become a keen learner and a dedicated team member and Finally I will try to produce a dissertation that I can be proud of and even publish some high-quality papers. And I will be prepared to become an international scholar someday.

merit and demerit

A lot of qualities are valuable to me. For example, integrity, intelligence,dedication. For me the thing I value most is that I am self-motivated. Growing up, I almost never need to be forced to study. My curiosity and sense of responsibility provide constant drive for me. Besides, I’m always looking for opportunities to better myself.

We should also try to overcome our flaws. The one thing that I have been working on is the tendency to work too fast. While a lot of my friends are in the habit of procrastination, I always prefer getting it done early and quickly. This can be a good thing in most cases, because when you have time on your side, you can often have better results. But sometimes I feel I should take more time to think and learn before I start. So I am using planned timelines to help myself slow down.

reason

(model effect)

For me, the person is Junde Lin, a nuclear scientist who passed way ten years ago. He worked to guard our homeland with the advanced nuclear technology. Some scientists gave up luxurious lives abroad, like Huang Danian. Most led simple material lives like Yuan Longping. They all like a constellation, and the idea of flying towards them will always fuel me to be a better version of myself.

(pity)

I must admit that as an undergraduate student I should have tried hader to look for research projects that I could take part in, although they were not included in my curriculum. But this pity is also what moticated me to pursue my postgraduate degree, because I believe research is very important, not only to academia but also to our overall capabilities.

(interest)

There are a few topics to be honest, I am already very interested in, such as distiribued storage and big data. But I know they are a little bit too broad, at this point, I don’t think I fully understand what’s been done in this area. So if I am lucky to be admitted into your program, I will enroll in relavant coureses. And with the excellent mentor, with the bibliography, I’m sure that I can be more specific and I can even cultivate other interests.

volunteer

In tems of my volunteer experience, the first thing that pops into my mind is International Day of Persons with Disabilities. This event was held by us with the Shunjiang community, as well as other academies in our school. We contacted some schoolmates to perform hand dance, and A host of elites provided their service to the loacl residents, Well all the money earned on that day has been donated to the Disabled Welfare Foundation. This activity almost lasted for 6 hours. When we took a joint photo, the sunshine fell down. At that time it was winter and we were very tired, while our hearts were full of warmth.

counselor assistant

When I was a freshman, I became a counselor assistant. During the college time, I have learned some useful skiils. for example, when sorting out the report card, I learned some skills about excel. When dealing with affairs for counselors, I learned how to communicate better with people. When writing some public account articles, I learned how to use words properly.

big data

We are surrounded by data. Every time we use social media, buy something online, or even search for information, we are creating data. Because there’s so much of it, and because it comes in many forms, we call it big data.

Big data is a kind of data collection which is beyond the capability of traditional database in acquisition, storage, management and analysis. The strategic significance of big data technology lies not in mastering huge data information, but in processing these data to make the data more meaningful.

artificial intelligence

Artificial intelligence can simulate people’s consciousness and thinking process, and think like people. Research in this field includes language recognition, image recognition, natural language processing and expert system. In general,one of the main goals of AI research is to enable machines to perform complex tasks that people usually need to do.

advantage：

Unlike humans, machines don’t get tired. They work very efficiently, even if they have to work for hours.In some situations where personal safety is vulnerable, artificial intelligence can be used. Artificial intelligence will gradually replace people’s tedious work and gradually liberate people’s hands, but in this way, a large number of people will lose their jobs.

disadvantage：

AI needs a lot of memory, computing power and big data to work, and may not be suitable for low-power devices. Machines have no aesthetic and emotional sense. Although machines can imitate human painting, poetry, music and other artistic styles, and can reproduce and create computer art works, they don’t really know what beauty is.

graduation project

As for my graduation project, the topic is completing the design and implementation of kv storage engine based on Raft protocol, a consensus algorithm for managing a replicated log. Firstly I’ll implement Raft protocol. It includes leader election, log replication, persistent storage, log compression. And the last one is used to finish the snapshoot function. Next I’ll build a key/value service on the top of Raft. Then I will “shard” the service over multiple replicated state machines for higher performance. At last, I need to provide my own API to enable data addition, deletion, modification, query and other operations.

mapreduce

The mapreduce system includes some worker processes and a coordinator. The worker process needs to call application Map and Reduce functions and handles reading and writing files. The coordinator process that hands out tasks to workers and copes with failed workers. I’ll be building something similar to the MapReduce paper. Users only need to specify their own Map and Reduce applications, the system will start up in a parallel way to get higher performance.

subjects

见subject-ppt

entry.title: 考研初试经验
entry.content:
考研，永远不是一个人的兵荒马乱。

为什么考研？

看到别人考研，那我也准备考研，这可能是大多数人的思想吧。很多人考研是为了随大流，但如果你没有一个确定的目标，很难坚持下去，就算坚持了，也可能未必有好的结果。这个目的会有很多，学技术，搞科研，也可以是为了心爱的人而努力，但绝不应该是逃避工作，但我希望你是为了更好的学习技术而获得更好的工作。应该静下心来仔细思考这个问题，并且给你自己一个你认为满意的答案。

考研推荐

本帖作者考数一，英一，政治和计算机专业基础，专业代码820（计算机操作系统和数据结构），本科期间有认真学习，虽然不是夜以继日的学习，但老师布置的任务会去认真完成，不会的题目在当时也会弄懂了，所以有一定的基础。如果自认为基础有一些薄弱，那进度以及学习时间需要你自行把控了。

数一

高数部分：视频课：张宇（基础和强化），两本书，习题册：张宇的书课后的题+AAA。

线性代数：视频课：李永乐（基础和强化），两本书，基础篇建议直接打印下来就行。因为他的基础篇内容并不多，或者你就看电子版，有ipad的话最好了。习题册：课后题+AAA。

概率论：视频课：余炳森（基础和强化），一本书。习题册：课后题+AAA。

AAA习题册：李林880，李永乐660（题不用做太多，真的，如果上面你这两本习题吃透了够够的了，优先选择880），如果你对自己有较大的期望，那么冲一下李林老师的108题，这本书会在考研后期出版。

BBB真题：2002年—-2021年（我是2022级研究生，所以考的就是2021年的试卷），如果以后有了2022年的试卷，后面你就延长一下，把前面的试卷去掉一年，但保持总共20张试卷的样子。

CCC模拟题：李林六套卷+李林四套卷，余炳森试卷的概率论部分，如果你还有时间并且想挑战一下自己，那么合工大和超越的卷子，你可以去做一下，我当时就做了两三套的样子，可以拓宽视野。

英一

单词：永远的神。你的英语成绩80%来自于你的词汇量，所以背单词这一主题亘古不变。“墨墨背单词”，这个软件是我用的最合适的，一开始在用“不背单词”这个APP，但是这个APP适合你以不背单词为主题来使用，因为他会让你来拼写，界面UI也做得很好，但是他不适合于背单词，他适合欣赏单词，墨墨背单词非常适合于背单词，他很快很轻松地让你过完单词。墨墨背单词会收费，那么请郑重的对待你当时买下它的时候你的那份初心。当然一千万个人心中有一千万个哈姆雷特，只有你用过了才知道哪个最适合你。

阅读：不要去想着做二遍，三遍，考研真相和黄皮书随便一个都是从好多年前的试卷开始的，你真的没有那么多时间去反攻，就一遍，认认真真的对待，认认真真的改正错误，一篇阅读做完了，自己列好提纲，琢磨一下作者的写作思路和命题人的命题，他们设置的坑往往就是那么些，没有必要去分门别类说这是一道细节推断题题，作者主旨题，当你做到大概4~5套题的时候，你的脑子已经记得差不多了，真正的答案是要回归到文章中，认识词汇，捋清逻辑才是王道。

写作：后期冲刺就好，我会把我写的英语小作文和大作文模板发到我的Github上面，UESTC_EXAM_XMIND，有意者请自行下载。

政治

视频课：学习顺序，马原（一定要看视频，徐涛老师）–>史纲–>毛中特–>思修–>当代。后面的看你个人了，时间充足就看视频，时间不充足就直接刷题（如果可以进那个打卡训练营，如果全勤会退你款的那种，拉个小伙伴一起，互相监督），当代后面直接刷题。

习题册：马原的1000题，刷不完就刷不完，没啥大不了的，后面套卷找补就行了。但是马原你一定要刷，史纲一定要刷。肖老师的四套卷和八套卷一定要做，最后要在小程序来回刷，反复的刷，但你要弄清楚为什么对和为什么错，不能记答案，其他的老师的卷子就作为你知识的补充，一天刷个2~3套，选择题刷的很快的，大题不用刷，后面直接背肖四。

主观题：肖四+研木易木子，后者是肖四大题的精华浓缩和补充，背这个就很好了，肖四会作为你的参考。

计算机专业基础（820）

由于我本科就是计算机专业的，所以在这两个科目上我并未花费很多很多的时间，而操作系统又是我大三所学习的。

视频课：王道，讲的很好。但数据结构单单看这个还不够，你要去看剑指offer的那些算法，代码层面实现的可以略看，主要是理解思想。

习题册：书后面的选择题认认真真做了（大题真的很多，做不完就做不完了，自己一眼没思路的直接看答案，反复看，只针对于应试考试），408真题做对应的部分（15套左右）。

时间规划

不好意思，这个是你根据你的实力自行安排的，我相信你有这个能力。前期抓住数学和英语单词，前中期抓住数学和英语阅读，中期抓住数学，英语阅读，政治，专业课，后期就全面推进了。没错，如你所见，得数学者得天下，但失英语和政治者也不会有很好的下场，专业课若不是跨考生，你稳扎稳打，定会没有问题。

奇淫巧计

数学

1.心一学长（ https://space.bilibili.com/237004182 ），遇到某种细节题没有理解，过来搜一下即可，讲的通俗易懂。

2.进击的阿尔法刚（ https://space.bilibili.com/185269775 ），讲的很棒，李林4套卷和6套卷讲解非常细，注意该UP的中秋特辑。但是我写这篇博客的时候他把那个视频下架了，不知道是否还会有。

3.历年真题详解找网盘资源即可。

英语

1.阅读+完形：晓航老师（ https://space.bilibili.com/259835473 ），自己先做，做完听讲解，自己复盘。

2.英语小作文：背英语牛津词典的娜拉（ https://space.bilibili.com/430514944 ），我的作文模板就是从这里来的。

3.英语大作文：我是瑞斯拜（ https://space.bilibili.com/11021614 ），我的大作文模板就是从这里来的。

4.剩下的一些：颉斌斌老师（ https://space.bilibili.com/271970833 ），这个老师很强，如果你的阅读能力很差的话，可以来看这个老师，他有另外的一种方法，但是我个人还是觉得不放心，我自己的阅读还是听的晓航老师的，这个老师还会有政治真题讲解，这个可以听一听就不几套，虽然是政治，但是仍然借用英语阅读的逻辑。

政治

1.大牙考研（ https://space.bilibili.com/404761607 ），后面会讲肖四和肖八。

2.空卡空卡空空卡（ https://space.bilibili.com/16671656 ），考研加U站（ https://space.bilibili.com/1531073360 ），这两个主要看串讲，帮你捋思路。

计算机专业基础（820）

1.操作系统：王道（这个自己去寻找资源吧）

2.数据结构：灰灰考研（ https://space.bilibili.com/348925757 ）+王道（作为补充）。数据结构的代码层面讲解（ https://space.bilibili.com/348925757 ）

心态调整

  1. 我是暑假开始正式准备的，开始的比较晚，但是我心态还可以，每天大概9点去自习室学到11点半，下午3点左右到学到5点半，晚上7点半到9点半。这个时候还是不错的，每天还是蛮快乐的，且偶尔的摆烂会让心情好受很多。
  2. 离秋季开学大概还有1周左右，就没什么心思学习了，开始玩，我觉得并没有什么，可是后来还是会后悔这一段时间没有认真学习，如果你真的真的不想学，那么这个时期就不学了，彻底的玩开了，够了就该回来学习了。
  3. 秋季正式开学后，就认认真真的学习，这个时候会开始保研生名额的确定，不要被他们影响，虽然选择会大于努力，你在这个专业只能在中等，而换个专业同样的绩点可能会排在前面，但是但是但是，选择的时机已经过去了，和你的死党抱怨一下你的心情会好很多，继续冲，不要停。
  4. 接下来就是国庆的7天假期，觉得真的很累的话，给自己3天的假好好去玩耍， 玩够了，就继续加油，还记得最开始让你定的目标吗，为之努力。
  5. 考研前的两个星期，开始焦虑甚至可能会失眠，没有最好了，有的话，给自己休息1~2天，好好逛一逛，玩一玩，接下来是最后最后的冲刺。
  6. 偶尔性的记录生活，考研成功也好，失败也罢，到时候发个朋友圈，给自己一个交代，至少拼搏努力过了。

寄语

我不想像其他的人一样祝你们考上研究生，当然，如果你考上了研究生，并且你有看过这篇文章，那么我由衷的为你感到高兴，如果你没有考上研究生，你一定一定会在另一个地方绽放自己的光芒。

Salute！！！

entry.title: 考研时间线
entry.content:
时间点注意事项
7月-9月新大纲发布，注意大纲变动，调整复习策略
8月-9月院校招生简章，招生目录公布
9月19日-9月23日研招网网上咨询周，可以打电话咨询招生办
9月24日-9月27日考研预报名开始
10月10日-10月31日考研正式报名
11月初现场确认/网上确认
11月底-12月初各省市公布政策
12月15日左右打印准考证
12月25日左右正式考试（初试）
次年2月中旬初试成绩公布
2月中下旬34所自划线院校公布复试线
3月15日左右国家线公布
3月15日-4月初院校公布复试名单，细则
3月底-4月初调剂开启
3月底-4月初组织复试
4月-5月公布复试名单
6月录取通知书
